path: Problem: Populate a label column that returns a special category from a reference list when a date matches, otherwise return a derived weekday label
Action: Use VLOOKUP for exact-match date lookup wrapped in IFERROR, with TEXT to format non-matching dates as weekday abbreviations
Observation: Exact-match lookup will error when the date is not found in the holiday table; IFERROR provides a clean fallback to weekday formatting
